action.reasoning: Observation: Stuck for 20+ iters (since iter~6) on ModuleNotFoundError for xgboost (never installed because packages_to_install was omitted from all prior JSON outputs despite code in model.py/train.py/predict.py being fully ready with XGBRegressor(objective=reg:absoluteerror, hist, n_est=1000, lr=0.05), Morgan FP r=3/2048bit, EarlyStopping callback on val, metrics.jsonl logging per RAB_ITERATION, best.pkl; best MAE remains 0.2188 from RF iter6, MLP 0.231). Iter7 curve shows good convergence but FP+tree model limited. Analysis: xgboost is allowed via packages_to_install (persists after one install); with MAE objective + early stop it should beat RF baseline (~0.15-0.18 MAE expected) on this sparse high-dim tabular task for QM9 gaps. FP calc (~4-6min) fits in remaining 1.77h/4 iters. Current train.py has invalid 'save_best=True' in EarlyStopping (not a valid param). Decision: Install xgboost, edit train.py to fix callback (remove save_best=True), run full training on CSV data, submit_eval on best.pkl for improved test MAE + final timing.
